title: Farmer's (Delight) Croptopia
description: Compatibility between Farmer's Delight and Croptopia
body: This mod adds some compatibility between Croptopia and Farmer's Delight. The biggest thing is that all recipes that use a cooking pot from Farmer's Delight now can be crafted using the pot from Croptopia, and vice versa. Additionally, some small changes have been made to recipes to ensure that all items from one mod that should work for the other, do. Want to request compatibility for your favorite addon? [Submit an issue on the Github.](https://github.com/ACCBDD/farmers-croptopia/issues) Currently supported: | | 1.20.1 | 1.21.1 | |---------------------|--------|--------| | Croptopia | ✅ | ✅ | | Farmer's Delight | ✅ | ✅ | | Ender's Delight | ✅ | ✅ | | Rustic Delight | ✅ | ✅ | | Seed Delight | ✅ | ✅ | | Nether's Delight | ✅ | ❌ | | Delightful | ✅ | ❌ | | Crabber's Delight | ✅ | ✅ | | Vintage Delight | ✅ | ✅ | | Casualness Delight | ✅ | ✅ | | More Delight | ✅ | ❌ | | Fruits Delight | ✅ | ✅ | | Oceanic Delight | ✅ | ✅ | | Brewin' and Chewin' | ✅ | ✅ | | Cultural Delights | ✅ | ❌ | | Veggies Delight | ✅ | ✅ | | My Nether's Delight | ✅ | ✅ | | Miner's Delight | ✅ | ✅ | | Farmer's Respite | ✅ | ❌ |
